competitorNews.title: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026 Release
bullets: SAP announced 1H 2026 release focused on connected AI, unified experiences, compliance, and skills governance.
Agentic AI network now spans recruiting, workforce administration, payroll, learning, performance, and talent development.
Native SmartRecruiters integration is positioned as connected recruiting plus onboarding with Employee Central.
Release introduces additional pay-transparency and governance capabilities tied to evolving regulation.
Positioning emphasizes end-to-end suite cohesion and confidence in enterprise decision-making.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SAP is tightening suite lock-in; defend Workday's unified HCM and compliance depth in enterprise deals.

competitorNews.title: April 2026 Product Release Highlights
bullets: SmartRecruiters released Winston Companion Knowledge Base Agent for in-product, natural-language support answers.
The agent cites Help Center sources with direct links, reducing recruiter and hiring-manager dependency on admins.
New AI Disclosure capability adds candidate-facing transparency messaging across channels and regions.
Regional controls for disclosure text are positioned as global compliance support for AI use in recruiting.
Company reiterates monthly release cadence and AI-first recruiting workflow optimisation.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters is moving fast on explainable AI UX; prioritise transparent AI disclosure controls.

competitorNews.title: iCIMS Spring 2026 Product Release
bullets: iCIMS launched Frontline AI for high-volume hiring with candidate and hiring-manager AI experiences.
Candidate flow supports AI-led interactions across SMS, WhatsApp, and web in a mobile-first journey.
Platform update adds trigger-based automation, source attribution, and interview scheduling improvements.
iCIMS claims up to 75% faster time to fill and up to 90% reduction in manual hiring tasks in customer outcomes.
Release leans into a unified enterprise platform narrative spanning corporate and frontline hiring.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: iCIMS is pressing on frontline AI speed claims; counter with HiredScore depth and enterprise scale.

competitorNews.title: Greenhouse Release Notes - March 2026
bullets: Greenhouse improved candidate profile actions and panel usability, including clearer action labels and close controls.
Duplicate candidate detection was tightened to email, phone, or LinkedIn URL to reduce false positives.
Suggested interview times now support multi-calendar views to reduce scheduling back-and-forth.
Greenhouse introduced Hire Link for Workday to export new-hire data and initiate onboarding in Workday.
New stage-mapping and API-usage visibility features target process transparency and integration observability.
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse is reducing ATS-to-HCM friction; reinforce Workday native flow as lower-complexity default.
